themes.title: Notification Delivery Improvements
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability and speed of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Preferences and Accessibility
themes.description: Improving user control over notifications and accessibility features.

themes.title: Analytics and Feedback
themes.description: Collecting data and feedback to improve notification effectiveness.

milestones.name: MVP - Notification Delivery Fixes
milestones.description: Address critical notification delivery issues on Android 14.
milestones.success_criteria: Notification delivery issues on Android 14 are resolved, with a 95% success rate.

milestones.name: V1 - User Preferences and Accessibility Enhancements
milestones.description: Implement features for user preferences and improve accessibility.
milestones.success_criteria: User preferences are customizable, accessibility is improved, and notification latency is reduced by 30%.

milestones.name: V2 - Analytics and User Feedback
milestones.description: Implement analytics features and collect user feedback.
milestones.success_criteria: A/B testing and user feedback collection are successfully implemented, with at least 100 responses collected.

sequencing.reason: V1 requires the resolution of critical notification delivery issues from MVP.
V2 depends on the successful implementation of user preferences and accessibility enhancements in V1.

mvp.goal: Resolve critical notification delivery issues to ensure a reliable user experience.

v1.goal: Enhance user control over notifications and improve accessibility features.

v2.goal: Implement analytics and feedback mechanisms to continuously improve notifications.
